title: Type - Scheduled Vesting Statement
description: A vesting statement that vests on a time grid: it always carries a `schedule`, and may also carry an `event_condition` (DATE when bare, HYBRID when gated). One of the two shapes a `VestingTerms` (v2) statement can take.

order.description: 1-indexed position of this statement within the template. Scheduled Vesting Statements chain implicitly in this order.

event_condition.description: Optional named-event axis. When present, the grid is gated on this event (HYBRID).

percentage.description: The share of the grant this statement covers, as an OCF Numeric decimal (e.g. "0.25").
